title: Hezbollah lawmaker Ali Fayyad calls ceasefire extension 'meaningless'
snippet: Hezbollah lawmaker Ali Fayyad calls the 3-week ceasefire extension 'meaningless' in a public statement. Says Israel 'violates ceasefire daily' and extension 'only gives Israel more time to complete its goals in southern Lebanon.' Fayyad is a senior Hezbollah political figure. Statement signals Hezbollah may not honor extended ceasefire terms.
tag_reason: New official Hezbollah political statement rejecting ceasefire extension. Ali Fayyad is new named actor. 'Meaningless' language signals possible ceasefire collapse.
